unified_research_question: How much model fidelity is needed, and when can adaptive observers compensate under hardware limits?
controller_takeaway: PID and ADRC show similar instability in high mismatch cases
observer_takeaway: above this delay, a robust ADRC tuning window mostly disappears
simple_takeaway_1: First, identify if delay or aerodynamics is the bigger issue in your regime.
simple_takeaway_2: In high mismatch cases here, PID and ADRC are similarly stable.
simple_takeaway_3: But ADRC needs enough actuator speed; too much delay can remove good tuning choices.
simple_takeaway_4: So: choose model fidelity first, then choose controller bandwidth that hardware can actually support.
simple_takeaway_5: Use this as a design rule, not a universal law; validate with flight data next.
